    def test_claim_request(self, page):
        login = LoginPage(page)
        claim = ClaimPage(page)
    
        login.load()
        login.login("Admin", "admin123")
    
        claim.verify_claim_click()
        claim.initiate_claim_request()
        claim.enter_claim_details()
